name: Sarah Vance
notes: Strong adoption — 22 of 25 seats active, usage up 40% QoQ. December QBR was positive, they called us 'essential to their workflow.' Executive sponsor is David Oyelaran, VP of Data Science. CSM: Morgan Reese.

name: IT Ops Team
notes: Worrying trend — seat activation dropped from 14 to 8 over the last quarter. Three support tickets in the last month, all integration-related. Original champion (Jamie Liu, Director of Analytics) went quiet after the first month. CSM: Taylor Kim.

name: Nadia Fernandez
notes: Multi-year customer, rock-solid usage. Near-full seat utilization. Referenced us in two case studies. Renewal is not the question — expansion is. They mentioned a new business unit spinning up in Q2. CSM: Morgan Reese.

name: Kai Nakamura
notes: Small account, relatively new. Modest usage growth but from a low base. Only one touchpoint since onboarding — a brief email exchange in December. Hard to read. No CSM assigned (below threshold).
